name: WiFiPacketRadio
summary:
WiFiPacketRadio
Crude method in transmitting compressed audio over WiFi packet injection and receiving it on monitor mode WiFi radios.

documentation.readme: WiFiPacketRadio Crude method in transmitting compressed audio over WiFi packet injection and receiving it on monitor mode WiFi radios.
usage_sections: Implement a small RX audio buffer (consisting about 60ms) sampled audio, and send it to the audio layer. This is to avoid the "stuttering" of the packets arriving not on the same timeframe
Build a "Pi powered" HT (handheld transceiver) unit, with a LCD, buttons and LiPo cell. (Will be expensive in small numbers) or a similar system.
Implement selective private comms by radio ID or MAC, say, between vehicle 1 and 3, without vehicle 2 hearing the conversation.
